title: COLD WEATHER SHELTER - 211info
text: COMPASS OUTREACH COLD WEATHER SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a warming center when temperatures drop to 36 degrees. Partners with Faith Lutheran Church located at 2741 Sherman Avenue, North Bend, OR 97459. 1200 Newmark Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted; priority is given to people experiencing homelessness with mental health conditions Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-8am when temperatures are 36 degrees or colder Email (541) 888-3202 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 888-3202 Main phone (541) 808-0940 FAX Main phone (541) 888-3202 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry and Douglas counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across from the Y Marina on Newmark in the Empire District. Stop on the CCAT West Loop. Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NAVIGATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMPASS OUTREACH
